After coming out on top in an all-English semi-final when they beat Nottingham Forest 4-1, Villa go in search of their first silverware since winning the Coca-Cola Cup in 1995/96, and a first European trophy since lifting the 1981/82 European Cup. ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Stand Still and See
HBO.East.us2.description: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

HBO.East.us2.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
HBO.East.us2.description: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

HBO.East.us2.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: The Golden Generation
HBO.East.us2.description: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

HBO.East.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.East.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

HBO.East.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.East.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.East.us2.title: Twister
HBO.East.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

HBO.East.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.East.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.East.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.East.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: May 15, 2026: Ben McKenzie, Dan Jones, David French
HBO.East.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.East.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.East.us2.description: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
HBO.East.us2.description: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

HBO.East.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.East.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.West.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.West.us2.title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
HBO.West.us2.description: Debuting original material about the shared experiences as humans, tackling topics like family, religion and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity; expecting an original and unforgettable experience, filmed at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: Feelings
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comic/actor Ramy Youssef offers his thoughts on a number of subjects, including the best day of the week to pray, his father's immigration story and connection to Donald Trump, and his complicated love for LeBron James.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: More Feelings
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy Youssef returns to the stage to offer his unique reflections on a divided world, the unexpected perils of charitable giving, the 2024 presidential election, prayer, and a childhood book report that changed the course of his life.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rocket Science
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: George Lopez: America's Mexican
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic performs at the Dodge Theater in Phoenix; topics include immigration, modern children, interracial relationships and dementia.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Amy Schumer: Live at the Apollo
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic brings her unique blend of honesty and unapologetic sense of humor to a performance at the historic Apollo Theater in New York.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Atsuko Okatsuka: The Intruder
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic-actor dishes on the futile art of impressing teenagers, attending a "Magic Mike Live" show with her grandmother, and the alarming reactions that she and her husband had to the unwanted presence of an intruder.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Dan Soder: Son of a Gary
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a performance from The Bowery Ballroom in New York City, the comic discusses topics including drug dogs at the airport, the customer service generation, fake fights in the shower, and what it's like to have an alcoholic but fun dad.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Making the Cut
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Hot Headed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Who Do You Think You Are?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Real Kingpin
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Tournament of Champions
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: How We Get Free
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Finding the Way Home
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The stories of eight children who have been reunited with family members or placed in loving foster homes after being exposed to the distressing conditions prevalent in orphanages and institutions around the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Stopping The Steal
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An inside account of President Trump's challenge to the results of the 2020 presidential election as told by former White House staff and appointees.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Game Night

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Zola

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Twilight

Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2

Ahora, con más de 40 años, e inesperadamente soltero, Cal ingresa al vicioso mundo de las citas románticas. Jacob Palmer decide ayudar a Cal y le enseña a tener éxito con las damas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Euphoria

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Michelle, una agente del Gobierno, debe escoltar durante un vuelo a Winston, un criminal que ha aceptado ofrecer testimonio en un caso que incrimina a un jefe de la mafia. Michelle descubre que el piloto es un sicario contratado para matar a Winston.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.subtitle: The Fifth Victim

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.subtitle: Mental Evidence

Secret Service agent Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) springs into action to bring U.S. President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) to safety. When Asher falls into the hands of the sinister organization, it's up to Banning to save his commander in chief from a horrible fate.

The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Supremacy

His latest job leads to a double-cross, leaving him stuck in a high-tech facility with the worst that society has to offer. Luckily for Ray, he meets Emil Rottmayer (Arnold Schwarzenegger), an inmate who secretly helps him hatch a plot to win his freedom. Only sadistic warden Hobbes (Jim Caviezel) stands in the way of the two men successfully making it out alive.

Banding together, the co-workers must use their wits to make it out alive amid all the chaos.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Escape Plan
AMC.HD.us2.description: Tough and chiseled Ray Breslin (Sylvester Stallone) knows how to infiltrate a prison -- and bust out of one. His latest job leads to a double-cross, leaving him stuck in a high-tech facility with the worst that society has to offer. Luckily for Ray, he meets Emil Rottmayer (Arnold Schwarzenegger), an inmate who secretly helps him hatch a plot to win his freedom. Only sadistic warden Hobbes (Jim Caviezel) stands in the way of the two men successfully making it out alive.

AMC.HD.us2.title: White House Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Legend
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert Neville, a scientist, is a survivor of a man-made plague that transforms humans into mutants. He wanders alone through New York City, calling out for other possible survivors and works on finding a cure for the plague using his own immune blood. Neville knows he is badly outnumbered and the odds are against him. The infected wait for him to make a mistake that will deliver Neville into their hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Book of Eli
AMC.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after war turned the world into a wasteland, a lone warrior named Eli marches across the ruined landscape, carrying hope for humanity's redemption. Only one other man understands the power of what Eli carries, and he is determined to take it for himself. Though Eli prefers peace, he must risk death to protect his precious cargo, to fulfill his destiny to help restore mankind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
AMC.HD.us2.description: When the dolphin mascot of Miami's NFL team is abducted, Ace Ventura, a zany private investigator who specializes in finding missing animals, looks into the case. Soon Miami Dolphins players are kidnapped too, including star player Dan Marino, making Ace's sleuth work even more pressing. Working with Dolphins representative Melissa Robinson, Ace closes in on the culprits, but not before many ridiculous misadventures.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
AMC.HD.us2.description: Legendary pet detective Ace Ventura returns for another adventure when he's coerced out of retirement while on a soul-searching retreat in the Himalayas. He must now retrieve an endangered white bat from a village located in Africa. The sacred animal was offered up as a wedding dowry from the Wachootoo prince to the Wachati princess, and, if Ace can't track down the culprit behind the kidnapping in time, civil war will break out between the two rival tribes.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black II
AMC.HD.us2.description: Kay and Jay reunite to provide our best line of defense against a seductress who levels the toughest challenge yet to the MIB's mission statement: protecting the earth from the scum of the universe. While investigating a routine crime, Jay uncovers a plot masterminded by Serleena, a Kylothian monster who disguises herself as a lingerie model. When Serleena takes the MIB building hostage, there is only one person Jay can turn to -- his former MIB partner.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard With a Vengeance
AMC.HD.us2.description: Detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is now divorced, alcoholic and jobless after getting fired for his reckless behavior and bad attitude. He is called back into action, however, when a cryptic terrorist (Jeremy Irons) takes New York City hostage in a lethal game of "Simon Says" and refuses to speak with anyone but McClane. Teaming up with a street-savvy electrician named Zeus Carver (Samuel L. Jackson), McClane dashes through the city, trying to stay one step ahead of a murderous plot.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky
AMC.HD.us2.description: Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone), a small-time boxer from working-class Philadelphia, is arbitrarily chosen to take on the reigning world heavyweight champion, Apollo Creed (Carl Weathers), when the undefeated fighter's scheduled opponent is injured. While training with feisty former bantamweight contender Mickey Goldmill (Burgess Meredith), Rocky tentatively begins a relationship with Adrian (Talia Shire), the wallflower sister of his meat-packer pal Paulie (Burt Young).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky II
AMC.HD.us2.description: Although working-class Philadelphia boxer Rocky Balboa lost his high-profile bout with the cocky world champion Apollo Creed, his Cinderella story has caught the national sports media's attention, and he now has the opportunity to capitalize on his sudden fame. Meanwhile, Creed is still smarting from nearly losing to some palooka no one has ever heard of, and arrogantly prods his newfound nemesis into getting back into the ring.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky III
AMC.HD.us2.description: Following his crushing defeat by Clubber Lang, Rocky Balboa joins forces with Apollo Creed in an effort to regain his title.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun: Maverick
AMC.HD.us2.description: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosa y su hijo Felipe quieren ganarse una cocina integral para un regalo de boda. Evangelina y Nicté llegan con mucho entusiasmo para ganar y duplicar sus premios con el Arca de Noé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuentas pasadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pedro es un sicario desahuciado que decide volver con la mujer que ama y descubre que tiene una hija, aunque sus deseos de vivir se hacen más fuertes, sus acciones pasadas lo persiguen.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me enamoró para robarme
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Israel perdió la cabeza por Ana y por amor le ofreció casa y trabajo en su negocio. Comienzan las peleas entre ellos y provocan que Ana se quede con la tienda. Israel la acusa de interesada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le puse el cuerno y se desquitó con su hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick separa a Guadalupe de la hija que tienen juntos y la deja en otra ciudad con su abuelo. Asegura que ella es una irresponsable tras descubrir su infidelidad con uno de sus amigos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una molestia ardiente; Lengüetazo viral
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ninoska le repara una pieza dental a Mari que antes le había dado problemas, ahora enfrenta una demanda. Le pasan la lengua a los helados y luego los devuelven, para dañarle el negocio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los no nacidos; Mi abuelo el influencer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sol quiere abrir un cementerio para bebés no nacidos, pero su esposo se niega. Un "influencer" hace un acuerdo con una funeraria para darle promoción; descubren que sus seguidores eran falsos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Él ya no me toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ale está desesperada por cambiar su apariencia y bajar de peso para atraer sexualmente a su novio. A ella le preocupa que Héctor ya no responde en la intimidad. Él dice que necesita su espacio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro familiar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino asegura que pronto su hija Circe estará fuera del negocio del narcotráfico y visita a los colombianos. Pero no todo es como espera. Isabel y Diego trabajan en equipo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No tengo cara; Patineta mortal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alegnis se arrepintió después de haberse sometido a 10 cirugías estéticas para convertirse en la copia de la exesposa de su marido. Carolina causó un accidente mortal con una patineta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El homúnculo; La niña y el abusador
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Katherine busca desalojar a la suegra por los experimentos que hace. Los padres dejaron que la menor embarazada se case, ella queda emancipada para algunas cosas, pero no para otras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial punk
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de Asia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de cumbia villera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de los 50's
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Como si fuera mi hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Clementina se compromete a cuidar de Pamela como si fuera su hija, pero todo se complica cuando su hijo Víctor Hugo y su amigo deciden secuestrar a la niña por dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le puse el cuerno y se desquitó con su hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick separa a Guadalupe de la hija que tienen juntos y la deja en otra ciudad con su abuelo. Asegura que ella es una irresponsable tras descubrir su infidelidad con uno de sus amigos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Con todo el peso encima; Iglesia de la marihuana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cree que su esposa quiere que regrese solo por una herencia, ella pide que se haga un bypass gástrico. La madre exige custodia total de su hija, el papá es pastor de la iglesia de la marihuana.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ahogamiento tardío; La muda y el pastel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La niña muere por el agua alojada en sus pulmones, su madre culpa al papá. Marina queda muda cuando su hijastra le empuja la cara contra el pastel y se perfora las cuerdas vocales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Recuerdos de mamá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karen está desequilibrada tras la muerte de su madre. Su abuela, en lugar de ayudarla, la llama loca y la joven termina internada en un psiquiátrico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las manos del corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Marcia tiene autismo y su situación se complica a medida que el niño crece. Sin embargo, Leonardo encuentra en la música la vía para expresar con sus manos lo que está en su corazón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encrucijada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Chelo y su médico son víctimas de un asalto y él recibe un balazo que lo pone al borde de la muerte. Nadie imagina que su hijo es parte de la banda de delincuentes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Claudia: ¿Me has visto?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danny, hija de Claudia y Noé, es secuestrada por la mujer encargada de cuidarla, y tras años de búsqueda, la familia se desmorona. Tras más de dos décadas de dolor, ellas logran reencontrarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lía: Pulso vital
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lía y su hermano consumen bebidas adulteradas en un bar y terminan en el hospital, ella no logra sobrevivir. Su madre, al descubrir que es donante órganos, decide cumplir el sueño de su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro familiar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino asegura que pronto su hija Circe estará fuera del negocio del narcotráfico y visita a los colombianos. Pero no todo es como espera. Isabel y Diego trabajan en equipo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El dúo dinámico
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Perla y Alan apuestan por duplicar sus premios con el juego "está trompudo o quiere beso". Paola y Frida, madre e hija, compiten por el dinero en efectivo para invertir en una cafetería.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dejarte ir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Deni y Mireya, madre e hija, se reencuentran luego de 40 años tras una fuerte pelea. Juntas toman una dura decisión, pero tienen las horas contadas y quizás no les dé tiempo de perdonarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Él ya no me toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ale está desesperada por cambiar su apariencia y bajar de peso para atraer sexualmente a su novio. A ella le preocupa que Héctor ya no responde en la intimidad. Él dice que necesita su espacio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aprovechada y ratera, esa es mi nuera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de Ana le reclama por aceptar que su hermano llevara a su pareja a vivir con ellos, sin exigirles que contribuyeran con los gastos. Ahora la nuera se fue y se llevó los muebles.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerta de alegría; Música para mis oídos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Asegura que su anciana hermana murió por la excitación sexual que experimentó con dos strippers. Le dan poco presupuesto para una publicidad musical y el resultado es una auténtica basura.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Maldita herencia; Voto de sacrificio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tres hermanas se disputan la herencia de la madre, una dice que la división debe ser entre dos. La esposa de Santiago gana un buen sueldo, pero tienen que vivir en la ciudad más cara del país.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se humilla por un hombre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana se preocupa mucho por su mamá. Ve que Juana se aferra a la relación con su papá, incluso sabiendo de las infidelidades y el maltrato. Juana pierde su autoestima, pero no quiere dejarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Isabel y Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aunque Diego quiere alejar a Isabel de sus planes, ella tiene su futuro claro, no va a separarse de él. Gavino está impaciente y mueve fichas para acabar con Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermana es una asesina; De corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natacha queda como la única heredera de su papá, pero su media hermana Claudia tiene otro testamento. Por otro lado, una familia contacta a la receptora del corazón que donó su hijo fallecido.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos enemigos; Agua bendita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Señalan a Juan de participar en el secuestro y muerte de una parte de la familia de Abel. Debby subasta el agua de unos baños que se dio y su amigo Josué le exige la mitad del dinero ganado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de nacos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de San Valentín
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de los 70's
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de safari
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se solicita empleo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis es un hombre soberbio que renuncia a su empleo por considerase superior. Un error que le cuesta caro porque su esposa Teresa está embarazada y podrían perderlo todo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aprovechada y ratera, esa es mi nuera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de Ana le reclama por aceptar que su hermano llevara a su pareja a vivir con ellos, sin exigirles que contribuyeran con los gastos. Ahora la nuera se fue y se llevó los muebles.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Odio y desalojo; The Gold Digger
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Quiere desalojarlos por conflictivos, ellos creen que los discrimina. Mirela llega a un acuerdo con José para quedarse con la pensión de su padre, pero el plan se cae cuando aparece la viuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La recompensa; Bendita sea mi padre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su esposo es el ladrón y ella quiere la recompensa que ofrecen por su captura. Marina se entera de que un cura demostró que es su padre y obtuvo su custodia, quiera llevársela a Panamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo tiene remedio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Beto, el hijo de Damián y Carla, tiene un tumor cerebral y necesita una cirugía. Su padre es despedido y ante la desesperación está a punto de robar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La mujer de blanco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Norma quiere ser enfermera pero su tía no está de acuerdo, ya que considera que esa no es una carrera e insiste en que debe estudiar leyes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No hay amor más grande
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Memo rechaza el trasplante de riñón y necesita una nueva cirugía. Sus padres viven una crisis de pareja y están desesperados por la situación de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cielo: Un cambio de ruta inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cielo cae en manos de una red del crimen organizado tras reunirse con Mauricio, su exnovio, quien se convierte en el principal sospechoso. La madre de la joven, con ayuda, logra encontrarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Monse: Si me engañas, te mato o me mato
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los celos de Monse se descontrolan cuando su esposo recibe un ascenso y una nueva asistente. Ella recae en la bebida y él se convierte en víctima de violencia, necesita ayuda profesional.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Isabel y Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aunque Diego quiere alejar a Isabel de sus planes, ella tiene su futuro claro, no va a separarse de él. Gavino está impaciente y mueve fichas para acabar con Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El que nada sabe, nada teme
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Berenice y César cultivan un hermoso jardín para ganar una cocina integral. Ricardo y Aldo deben afrontar un desafío como superhéroes para poder escaparse con un automóvil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El video
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Naomi fue atacada por Elena y las imágenes se hicieron virales. Ahora que sabe que su agresora también sufre, reconoce que las cosas no son siempre lo que parecen, o lo que se sube a las redes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se humilla por un hombre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana se preocupa mucho por su mamá. Ve que Juana se aferra a la relación con su papá, incluso sabiendo de las infidelidades y el maltrato. Juana pierde su autoestima, pero no quiere dejarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se aprovechó de mi enfermedad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Saraí denuncia maltratos por parte de su madre y asegura que les pidió dinero a los vecinos para pagar su funeral cuando ella estuvo hospitalizada, tras ser diagnosticada con cáncer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Disputa porcina; No soy judía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Atropella a un cerdo en la calle y lo cocina, Dayamit dice que era su mascota. Livi escapó con su dote de 60 mil dólares, la madre quiere que la devuelva si no se casa, pero ella ya la usó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Anguila peligrosa; Sexo laboral
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abraham e Iruan se enfrentan por el contrabando de anguilas. No quiere pagar por la muerte de su empleado porque dice que en ese momento no trabajaba, sino que tenía sexo con su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aguanto su infidelidad por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia descubre la traición de Enmanuel y no puede hacer nada por la seguridad de sus dos hijos. Leonor, su suegra, defiende a capa y espada a su hijo. Aparece Frida para despejar dudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regresa el aprendiz
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito va por Gavino a Babel y se arma una balacera. Cuando está a punto de matar al capo, sucede algo inesperado que cambia su destino. Diego logra que Circe siga creyendo en él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermano abusa a hermano; Universidad de influencers
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anthony exige que su hermano Edgard le pague por haberlo violado. Una madre se niega a entregarle dinero a su hijo para sus estudios, ella alega que no escogió una carrera profesional.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.subtitle: Uruguay

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Europa League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos que participan en la competición.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Es la segunda competición de la UEFA, pero siempre cuenta con equipos de primer nivel. Tras una fase liga de ocho jornadas, solo los mejores disputarán las eliminatorias por el título. La final de esta edición se disputará en el Besiktas Stadium de Estambul.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Betis
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Polen! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Ekstraklasa (33. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Hier können die Zuschauer die beeindruckendsten Tore der höchsten polnischen Liga nochmals sehen. Alle Tore werden von renommierten Fußball-Experten kommentiert. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (34. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Premier League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: 37. Spieltag: Aston Villa – Liverpool FC
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die teuerste und die vielleicht auch beste Liga der Welt im Mutterland des Fußballs. Alle Spiele, alle Spieler, die Trainer und jede Menge Hintergrundinfos aus den Stadien und Trainingsplätzen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: SC Heerenveen – Ajax Amsterdam (34. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: FC Sao Paulo (BRA) – Millonarios (COL)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: CONMEBOL Sudamericana (Gruppenphase, 5. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Im zweitwichtigsten Wettbewerg des südamerikanischen Vereinsfußballs waren bisher die Vereine aus Argentinien am erfolgreichsten. Titelverteidiger ist in diesem Jahr CSD Defensa Justicia aus Florencia Varela in Argentinien. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Athletico Paranaense – Flamengo (16. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: AFC Champions League Two
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Al-Nassr (SAR) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der AFC Cup ist für Asien das, was die UEFA Europa League für Europa ist: der zweithöchste Fußballwettbewerb für die Vereinsmannschaften auf dem Kontinent.  (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Saudi-Arabien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Saudi Pro League (33. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Das Magazin konzentriert sich auf den Fußball in Saudi-Arabien. Es bietet eine umfassende Berichterstattung über die nationale Liga, wichtige Spiele und Spieler sowie Entwicklungen im saudischen Fußball insgesamt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Campeonato Brasileiro (16. Spieltag)

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - FINAL - INDIA vs MALAYSIA - (QUADRANT)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Main Event - UFC 284: Makhachev vs Volkanovski
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: At UFC 284, featherweight king Alexander Volkanovski sought a new challenge and a second belt by challenging lightweight champion Islam Makhachev. See both athletes train and prepare ahead of their title bout on UFC Main Event

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - GROUP D - INDONESIA vs BRUNEI - (TEAM)

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Unleashed - 1803 - Lightweight Title
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When Khabib Nurmagomedov retired from MMA, the UFC's lightweight title was up for grabs. See the journey of the 155-pound belt following the Khabib Era on UFC Unleashed. Featuring Charles Oliveira, Dustin Poirier, Islam Makhachev, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - FINAL - WINNER 45 vs WINNER 46 - (QUADRANT)

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 810 - UFC Connected 'Unbreakable: Zahabi Bros, Ultimate Access: Sharabutdin Magomedov, My Fight Week: Baisangur Susrkaev, Locked In: Joe Mazzulla, My Moment: Zhang Weili
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Inside Montreal's iconic Tristar Gym, we explore how the Zahabi brothers forged an unbreakable bond, shaped by discipline, loyalty, and the love of combat. We go behind the scenes to explore Shara Bullet Magomedov's transition from the octagon to the silver screen in his upcoming role in a new film produced by music stars Hit-Boy and Alchemist

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - GROUP B - MALAYSIA vs INDIA - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 317: Topuria vs Oliveira
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC International Fight Week 2025 concludes with a stacked card that features a highly anticipated bout between Brazilian superstar Charles Oliveira and undefeated former featherweight king Ilia Topuria for the vacant Lightweight crown. Plus Ajexandre Pantoja defends his flyweight belt against Kai Kara-France and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 901 - Unbreakable: Tabatha Ricci, Ultimate Access: Justin Gaethje & Michael Chandler, My Moment: Alexander Volkanovski, Locked In: Paddy Pimblett
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Tabatha Ricci and Callum Walsh detail how their unbreakable bond is driving their success in combat sports. Justin Gaethje and Michael Chandler bring their competitive edge to the fairway. Alexander Volkanovski reflects on his unforgettable championship victory over Max Holloway at UFC 245. We lock in on Paddy Pimblett's favorite UFC superstars.
